title: Ironbound Barbarian Tradition
atAGlance: Ironbound barbarians are mountain shock troops who channel fury through disciplined stance-work, shield hooks, and chain-line pushes rather than reckless charges.
sageNotes: Travelers expect a frothing berserker and get a grim wall-breaker instead. The Ironbound teach that rage is a tool, not a personality: breathe once, set boots, then break whatever line threatens your kin. In Kharad-Vul their veterans train beside lift chains and slag pits, so every strike is about leverage and footing. If you hear a sergeant shout 'Anchor and turn,' someone is about to be thrown off a ledge.
gameInformation: Use for PCs or elite NPC defenders in vertical siege scenes. Signature play pattern: shove, pin, and punish movement through chokepoints. Give environmental bonuses on catwalks, stairs, and lift platforms. Social hook: Ironbound mentors respect oaths kept under pressure; broken promises can lock off military support until reparations are made.
